caption: A man is seen opening packs of trading cards in a room with a table covered by a blue cloth featuring green palm trees. A smaller inset video shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt sitting in front of a computer. The main view focuses on a pair of hands interacting with white boxes and yellow envelopes. On-screen text displays "JASPYS LIVE" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" in red and white letters. Throughout the sequence, the hands remove a yellow envelope from a white box and then pull a trading card from inside the envelope. The card features a player in a white and blue uniform with "Justin" visible on the top. The background includes various stacked boxes and equipment, including what appears to be a small black electronic device on the table.
